name: SA Legal Templates
description: Document templates for South African law firms: engagement letters, court filings, and correspondence

templates.name: Engagement Letter — Litigation
templates.description: Standard litigation engagement letter covering scope, fees, and court procedures.

templates.name: Engagement Letter — Conveyancing
templates.description: Conveyancing engagement letter for property transfer matters.

templates.name: Engagement Letter — General
templates.description: General legal engagement letter for advisory and non-litigation matters.

templates.name: Power of Attorney
templates.description: Standard power of attorney template for authorising legal representation.

templates.name: Notice of Motion
templates.description: Court filing template for notice of motion applications.

templates.name: Founding Affidavit
templates.description: Court filing template for founding affidavit in motion proceedings.

templates.name: Letter of Demand
templates.description: Demand letter for collections and debt recovery matters.

templates.name: Client Trust Statement
templates.description: Statement of trust account transactions and balances for a specific client.

templates.name: Trust Receipt
templates.description: Receipt for funds received into the trust account on behalf of a client.

templates.name: Section 35 Cover Letter
templates.description: Cover letter for Section 35 trust account audit submission to the Legal Practice Council.

templates.name: Matter Closure Letter
templates.description: Closure letter issued to the client at matter conclusion summarising fees, disbursements, and retention terms.

templates.name: Statement of Account
templates.description: Statement of account summarising fees, disbursements, trust activity, and balance for a matter period.

templates.name: Offer to Purchase
templates.description: Offer to purchase for a conveyancing property transfer, covering parties, property, purchase price, occupation, and standard SA sale conditions (voetstoots, suspensive bond, transfer duty, FICA, rates clearance).

templates.name: Deed of Transfer
templates.description: Deed of transfer instrument lodged at the Deeds Office recording transfer of immovable property from transferor to transferee.

templates.name: Power of Attorney to Pass Transfer
templates.description: Power of attorney authorising the conveyancer to appear before the Registrar of Deeds and pass transfer on behalf of the transferor.

templates.name: Bond Cancellation Instruction
templates.description: Instruction letter to the bond institution to cancel the mortgage bond and furnish the title deed and Form J consent.
